allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Complete Bags.fm integration - wallet, swaps, launch, creator, social

Full integration of Bags.fm features into the BAGS Terminal:
- Solana wallet adapter \(Phantom, Solflare, Coinbase, Trust\)
- Real swap execution in terminal trade panel with quote fetching
- Token launch page \(/launch\) with fee share configuration
- Creator dashboard \(/creator\) with fee claiming
- Social linking \(Twitter, Kick, GitHub, TikTok\)
- API proxy route \(/api/bags\) with rate limiting
- Zustand stores for wallet, launch, creator, social state
- Error boundary, skeleton loaders, toast notifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(# Check for any plan files in the project find /mnt/c/Users/DESKTOP/ui -name ""*.plan.md"" -o -name ""PLAN.md"" -o -name ""plan.md"")
Bash(# Check server logs for any errors jobs -l ps aux)
